title: MANGA GOS2 Girlfriend of Steel 2
wikitext:
[]: [GOS2] Girlfriend of Steel 2             Quote Post by Dave » Wed Jun 23, 2004 6:25 pm http://mywebpages.comcast.net/juzzam1/NGEManapix.htm The manga on this page is pretty good. It's nice seeing all the characters without having to watch them go through all the mind fucking that happened during the show. [Edit]The manga is near the bottom of the page.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Jun 23, 2004 9:07 pm Wow :shock: , Fuyutsuki looks like a kindly old man, but Gendo looks like a pimp. I really like the loose art style on those comics, it's also refreshing seeing such a lively Rei. I really enjoyed the fact that Kaworu is there, he neede more screentime. Too bad I'll never be able to download an emulation of the game, being very computer illiterate.

[]:             Quote Post by Slade » Wed Jun 23, 2004 9:56 pm I also like the loose artstyle look, its a refreshing take on Rei's character, not that there was anything wrong with Rei's personality before. 8)

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Jun 28, 2004 4:23 am Hmm, I've been following this manga for a while now. Most of the people that know of it, tend to like the art style. It's a much more 'shoujo' take on all of the characters, so it tends to be a lote cuter than usual. Which, I guess, is a rather nice change. The OOC-ness of Asuka scares me greatly tho. I'm curious as to see how it turns out.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 28, 2004 2:44 pm So far the Girlfriend of Steel manga retells and then continues the alternate reality of episode 26 of the TV series. As I am not familiar with the Evangelion games, Girlfriend of Steel included, how does the story of the Girlfriend of Steel 2 manga relate to the Girlfriend of Steel game?

[]:             Quote Post by Dave » Mon Jun 28, 2004 3:01 pm It doesn't. The game basically just pushes in a few new characters and fights to the original eva storyline.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Mon Jun 28, 2004 3:06 pm Was there not a Girlfriend of Steel 2 Game released at some point?? I keep recalling something like that, but I don't know much about it at this point.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Mon Jun 28, 2004 10:04 pm Nope, no Girlfriend of Steel 2 game. Just a manga.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Tue Jun 29, 2004 1:13 am http://www.gainax.co.jp/soft/koutetsu2/img/mac_jacket.jpg Well then I think I need a new brain...

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Jun 29, 2004 3:14 am Ahh, my mistake then. I'm a bit behind on the games, I really need to find a decent resource on them. That looks pretty new, must have come out with the manga, which I'm behind on as well.

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Tue Jun 29, 2004 12:26 pm Ay, it's alright. I was just suddenly confused by 'game' 'no game' info. I believe that game has a few different choices/possibilities, but it's mostly a relationship building interactive thing. Shinji has Kaworu, Rei and Asuka after him. Kind of like the manga. Hence, I was thinking there were some similarities between that game and the GoS2 Manga as well.

[]:             Quote Post by dennisud » Fri Jul 02, 2004 1:32 pm Is it me... or does this feel more Gundumish in plot than the original? What I mean is there are from what I see other than Touji and Hikari, and the enigmatic Kaworu. Rei, and Asuka are enamored with Shinji, with Kaworu hovering in the background. While, of all people Kensuke is falling for Asuka! One facet of Asuka's personality that carries over from the canon is her apprehension at letting Shinji near emotionally, though he knows he's her friend. I'm going to look for this manga where I can. Even though it's more mainsteam than Sadamoto's it's got a nice feel to it.

[]:             Quote Post by sadsadshinji » Sat Jul 10, 2004 6:15 pm i like it as its kind of a happy ending type thing...and the style is more relaxed... i heard that the game is where you try to get Rei Asuka or kawouru (how do you spell it?)..kinda like a dating sim?

[]:             Quote Post by EVA-01X » Sat Jul 10, 2004 6:43 pm I have to say that I really liked the thing. Evan EVA needs a little WAFF here and there

[]:             Quote Post by RubberSoul » Wed Jul 14, 2004 2:44 am This may be a bit off-topic, but here's some screencaps from the 'Girlfriend of Steel 2' game just in case you haven't seen them. Warning: Weirdness and some nudity... Click here Warning: Weirdness, some nudity, shonen-ai implications, large images (Only 5 though) Some more I got the images from the 2nd link at a German website, but I don't remember what it was. As for the Girlfriend of Steel Eva manga, I actually enjoy it. It's very cute. EDIT: I fixed the second link. :oops:

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:19 pm Augh, yes. Those are from the game in which you can get several different endings. I don't know why they'd draw such young kids doing that. (This mostly pertains to that one picture of Asuka and Shinji... not so clothed.) The manga seems quite a bit like that so far. Everyone has taken a liking to Shinji. Hopefully there won't be multiple endings to it tho. I'd like for this manga to have some kind of concluding feel to it.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:49 pm Is there any place to download or just look at lots of pictures and info bout Girl Friend of Steel? I'm pretty curious how this game plays and the storyline. And RubberSoul, the second link is all messed up, it takes me there but says I'm not allowed to see it.

[]:             Quote Post by Phaze » Wed Jul 14, 2004 7:58 pm cain luppus wrote: Is there any place to download or just look at lots of pictures and info bout Girl Friend of Steel? I'm pretty curious how this game plays and the storyline. And RubberSoul, the second link is all messed up, it takes me there but says I'm not allowed to see it.

[]:             Quote Post by MongolSquad » Wed Jul 14, 2004 8:04 pm A Kawrou+Shiniji= :shock: Errrr, I am really curious, seriously if you know anything tell me, I can make own decisions even if their not good ones. XD

[]:             Quote Post by Asuka Langley » Wed Jul 14, 2004 8:06 pm Haha, Well depending on how you play the game, you can get 1 of 3 or so endings. One of which, has a Kaworu/Shinji pairing.
